scripts.build:rolldown: rolldown src/entry.mjs --file dist/rolldown.mjs --format esm --platform node --transform.target es2022 --strict-execution-order
scripts.test:rolldown: node --input-type=module -e "const result = await Promise.race([import('./dist/rolldown.mjs').then(() => 'resolved'), new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(() => resolve('timeout'), 1000))]); console.log(result); process.exit(result === 'timeout' ? 0 : 1)"
